meaning: 威斯巴登[德意志联邦共和国西部城市](黑森州首府)
examples: The official GDP was calculated by the Federal Statistics Bureau based in Wiesbaden.
The Hotel Klee am Park is situated in the best hotel location in Wiesbaden, directly to the spa gardens.
The Wiesbaden Contracting Center, which is part of the Army Contracting Command Europe, is the contracting activity.
He went on to become music director at the operas of Aachen, Wiesbaden and Cologne.
America, and Germany, were lucky to have in Wiesbaden someone as concerned and knowledgeable about art as Mr Farmer.
